sys_update_xml.name: sys_security_acl_9bb902e583f903d0331153a6feaad314
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_security_acl"><sys_security_acl action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><admin_overrides>true</admin_overrides><advanced>true</advanced><applies_to/><condition/><controlled_by_refs/><decision_type>allow</decision_type><description/><local_or_existing>Existing</local_or_existing><name>x_2056458_projec_0_project_tasks</name><operation display_value="write">write</operation><script><![CDATA[// Allows the team member to write to the record ONLY if it is assigned to them
if (current.assigned_to == gs.getUserID()) {
    answer = true;
} else {
    answer = false;
}]]></script><security_attribute/><sys_class_name>sys_security_acl</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-30 14:58:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>9bb902e583f903d0331153a6feaad314</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>x_2056458_projec_0_project_tasks</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Project Management System" source="x_2056458_projec_0">d7da3569837903d0331153a6feaad3d7</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Project Management System">d7da3569837903d0331153a6feaad3d7</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_security_acl_9bb902e583f903d0331153a6feaad314</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-30 14:58:19</sys_updated_on><type display_value="record">record</type></sys_security_acl></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_security_acl_5bf4ca6d83b903d0331153a6feaad3f0
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_security_acl"><sys_security_acl action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><admin_overrides>true</admin_overrides><advanced>true</advanced><applies_to/><condition/><controlled_by_refs/><decision_type>allow</decision_type><description/><local_or_existing>Existing</local_or_existing><name>x_2056458_projec_0_project_tasks</name><operation display_value="read">read</operation><script><![CDATA[if (gs.hasRole('u_project_manager')) {
    answer = true;
} else if (gs.hasRole('u_team_member') && current.u_assigned_to == gs.getUserID()) {
    answer = true;
} else {
    answer = false;
}]]></script><security_attribute/><sys_class_name>sys_security_acl</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-30 14:36:34</sys_created_on><sys_id>5bf4ca6d83b903d0331153a6feaad3f0</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>x_2056458_projec_0_project_tasks</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Project Management System" source="x_2056458_projec_0">d7da3569837903d0331153a6feaad3d7</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Project Management System">d7da3569837903d0331153a6feaad3d7</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_security_acl_5bf4ca6d83b903d0331153a6feaad3f0</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-30 14:36:34</sys_updated_on><type display_value="record">record</type></sys_security_acl></record_update>
